nasb.text: “He who is faithful in a very little thing is faithful also in much; and he who is unrighteous in a very little thing is unrighteous also in much.

esv.text: “One who is     faithful in a very little is also faithful in much, and one who is dishonest in a very little is also dishonest in much.

cnv.text: 在最小的事上忠心的，在大事上也忠心；在最小的事上不義的，在大事上也不義。

ccb.text: “一个人在小事上忠心，在大事上也会忠心；在小事上靠不住，在大事上更靠不住。

csbs.text: 在最小的事上忠心的人，在很多事上也忠心；在最小的事上不义的人，在很多事上也不义。
